text:
The Castor [Station] Line (, Kasutsūru-eki Hōmen) is a train line that runs in Yorknew City. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 12, Chapter 110 

Overview

The Castor Line is a train line that runs through Yorknew City and one of its destinations leads to the city's downtown. 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

Half of the Phantom Troupe members take this train line to Lipa Station while they are unknowingly tailed by Killua (in the last car) and Melody (in the same car). 

Trivia

In the manga and 1999 anime adaptation's translation, the train line is referred to only as "Castor Line", omitting the "Station" part. The 2011 anime adaptation also omits the word "Station" while the Crunchyroll version/translation removes "Line" as well (leaving just "Castor").

Translations around the World

References
